en_title: Will 007 First Light Get a Sequel? The Boss of Amazon Games Responds
cn_title: 《007 初露锋芒》续作有望？亚马逊游戏老大回应
subtitle: 续作悬念
opus_summary: IO Interactive的《007 初露锋芒》发售两周销量达300万份，但续作开发权引发担忧。亚马逊游戏负责人澄清未确认由亚马逊工作室接手，并称只要市场有需求，续作“似乎应该制作”。

paragraphs.en: IO Interactive’s 007 First Light has wowed critics and already reached 3 million sales in its first two weeks of release . But that success has also come with confusion over the future of the series, due to comments made last week by Amazon’s Head of Gaming, Jeff Gattis, who said that sequels will be "done by MGM and, theoretically, by Amazon Game Studios."
paragraphs.cn: IO Interactive 的《007 初露锋芒》大获好评，发售两周销量已达300万份。但这一成功也伴随着系列未来的不确定性，原因是亚马逊游戏负责人 Jeff Gattis 上周表示，续作将「由 MGM 开发，理论上也可能由亚马逊游戏工作室接手」。

paragraphs.en: To clarify the situation, IGN spoke with Gattis at Summer Game Fest about what the development and publishing of subsequent James Bond video games could look like.
paragraphs.cn: 为澄清情况，IGN 在夏日游戏节上与 Gattis 进行了对话，探讨后续詹姆斯·邦德游戏的开发与发行可能走向。

paragraphs.en: “First of all, let me set the record straight for you,” said Gattis. “I did not confirm that Amazon Game Studios is publishing the next one. Did not say that. So unfortunately, it got picked up, and once it runs, it runs. No, IO's been great. They've been great partners. In fact, I was over there visiting them in Copenhagen a couple of months ago. The game's doing great. Let's let the game breathe and have its day.”
paragraphs.cn: 「首先，让我澄清一下，」Gattis 说道，「我并没有确认亚马逊游戏工作室会发行下一部作品。我没说过。不幸的是，这话被传开了，一传就停不下来。不，IO 一直很棒，他们是出色的合作伙伴。事实上，几个月前我还去哥本哈根拜访了他们。游戏表现很好，让它先喘口气，享受它的高光时刻吧。」

paragraphs.en: Understandably, the uncertainty over IO’s ability to carry on making the new series it’s established caused a certain amount of worry with fans who would love nothing more than to see the Hitman studio continue its Bond origin story.
paragraphs.cn: 可以理解的是，IO 能否继续打造他们开创的新系列，这种不确定性让粉丝们颇为担忧——他们最希望看到的，莫过于《杀手》工作室能继续讲述邦德的起源故事。

paragraphs.en: “Trust that we're going to be smart about this,” Gattis reassured players. “I mean, it's market appetite. As long as we feel there's a desire for players to have the game, it’s safe to say it's going to be made.”
paragraphs.cn: 「相信我们会明智地处理这件事，」Gattis 安抚玩家道，「我的意思是，这取决于市场需求。只要我们觉得玩家有渴望，那么可以肯定地说，游戏就会做出来。」

paragraphs.en: To try and get as much confirmation as I was ever likely to in this interview, I once again asked if 007 First Light being on track to turn a healthy profit was as much of a green light as needed to get the next entry into production. Gattis’ answer: “Seems like a sequel should be made.”
paragraphs.cn: 为了在这次采访中尽可能获得确认，我再次追问，《007 初露锋芒》有望实现可观盈利，这是否足以给下一部作品开绿灯。Gattis 的回答是：「似乎应该制作续作。」

paragraphs.en: It’s by no means a guarantee, but it's promising news for those, like me, who thoroughly enjoyed IO’s single-player action adventure take on Britain’s most famous spy.
paragraphs.cn: 这绝非保证，但对于像我这样深深喜爱 IO 这款单人动作冒险版英国最著名间谍游戏的玩家来说，这无疑是个好消息。

paragraphs.en: Last week, IO CEO Hakan Abrak told IGN he was “very confident” 007 First Light will be profitable for the studio, despite it being the most expensive game it’s ever made. “There's some royalty models and whatnot around this, but we are well above our forecasts at this point,” he added. And of course there’s plenty more to come with the game itself, as .
paragraphs.cn: 上周，IO 首席执行官 Hakan Abrak 告诉 IGN，他「非常有信心」《007 初露锋芒》将为工作室带来盈利，尽管这是他们制作过成本最高的游戏。「这里面涉及一些版税模型之类的，但目前我们已经远超预期，」他补充道。当然，游戏本身还有更多内容即将推出。

paragraphs.en: 007 First Light took seven years to develop, but potential sequels could be made cheaper and quicker, Abrak added. Abrak said the cost associated with each World of Assassination title came down, and he’d expect the same with future James Bond games.
paragraphs.cn: Abrak 补充说，《007 初露锋芒》开发耗时七年，但潜在的续作可以更便宜、更快地制作。他表示，《杀手》系列每部作品的成本都在下降，他预计未来的詹姆斯·邦德游戏也会如此。

paragraphs.en: IGN’s 007 First Light review scored it 9/10. We said: “Demonstrably obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before, 007 First Light is the best Bond game I’ve ever played.”
paragraphs.cn: IGN 对《007 初露锋芒》的评测给出了 9/10 分。我们评价道：「《007 初露锋芒》显然痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实，这是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏。」

paragraphs.en: Our 007 First Light Guide has all the Essential Tips and Tricks you need to survive your first assignments, plus 6 Tips for Mastering Stealth so you can stay out of sight. There are plenty of achievements to unlock and collectibles to get your hands on, so check our guide to All Collectible Locations to make sure you don’t miss out. For a helping hand with your missions, head to our in-progress Walkthrough , and our guide to all the Safe Combinations and Keypad Codes .
paragraphs.cn: 我们的《007 初露锋芒》攻略包含完成首次任务所需的所有基本技巧，以及6条精通潜行的建议，助你隐匿行踪。游戏中有大量成就和收集品等你获取，请查看我们的全收集品位置指南，确保不错过任何内容。如需任务协助，请查阅我们正在更新的完整流程攻略，以及所有保险箱密码和键盘代码指南。
